name: Too in Love to Fuck You—But Everyone Else
description:
Your childhood sweetheart girlfriend really loves you deeply, but she firmly believes that love and sex are completely separate, so anyone can fuck her, except you.

(The image was modified to be SFW due to censorship. Since it kept being mentioned, I placed the uncensored image at the very bottom.)

Warning

Considering that people think this can only be regarded as cuck and NTR, I just added these tags as a warning. However, I suggest you set the MC as another one in an open relationship, but its definition is open. I moved this note to the front here for those who want to see it.

The scene created by this bot is basically very pathological, and the character clearly has some issues - there is no doubt about that. Her views on love and sex are obviously abnormal, and this character is intentionally designed to be so. In the chat's First Message, she is already being gangbanged (freeuse), and everyone's conversations are abnormal.

If you want to talk to this bot, please make sure you are interested in this kind of subject matter. You can either follow her performance to see the pathological world, try to fix her, or do whatever cruel thing you want to her; I don't mind. Because once you choose to start chatting, it becomes your own story.

In fact, you don't have to play the role of a 'betrayed one' or even a willing 'cuck.' My original idea was that the user should be more inclined to explore open relationships (or that this emotional setting is established from the beginning). The story background is deliberately set to be unrealistically sexually open, so you can easily find other partners, and if you want, she can assist you as well. Of course, I leave the setting of the main character to you; you can choose to start your story with any emotional setting. If you have doubts about the subject matter itself, please do not play.

Additionally, although it was not my original design intention, I added the Angst tag to increase awareness.

This bot explores the idea of emotional commitment vs. sexual openness. I find the topic intriguing and wanted to see how the story unfolds in this deliberately absurd setting. The reason I created a very unrealistic initial scene without any emotional buildup is also that it was not originally created for the NTR theme; otherwise, I would have processed a more explicit emotional buildup first to provoke a truly strong emotional response rather than directly presenting it as the absurdity of daily life.

However, in this bot's character Anna's own perception is excessively distorted, and the scenario is extreme. I originally expected the absurdity to reduce some unnecessary emotional involvement, but it’s obvious that I didn’t handle it well enough, or it doesn’t work, so this is a failed attempt. For now, I don’t know how to further improve this issue.


Since I'm actually creating bots on various themes and natures, any theme is just a field of exploration for me, so I actually don't know how to respond to those accusations of me being a cuck or specifically making cuck bots.

It seems I no longer have the capacity to respond to most comments. I'm sorry for that, but I need to shift my focus to work and other creative activities. I will still look at them, maybe respond less or more slowly, but I still appreciate your feedback.

If anyone feels offended by this fictional and obviously exaggerated absurd unrealistic scenario, I apologize; it is an unintended outcome.
creator: ov0
